sprint_goal:
*What to build:* Integration Tests - Sprint 3

*Details:* Write Pest/PHPUnit feature tests verifying: SLA calculations (breached and time-remaining fields), activity log creation on status change and assignment, ticket claim/assignment flow with authorization, filtered index for my_tickets and unassigned, and dashboard metrics endpoint output shape and values.

*Files to touch:* tests/Feature/V1/SlaPolicyTest.php, tests/Feature/V1/ActivityLogTest.php, tests/Feature/V1/TicketAssignmentTest.php, tests/Feature/V1/DashboardMetricsTest.php, database/factories/SlaPolicyFactory.php, database/factories/ActivityLogFactory.php

When done, post to <#C0BDKRX9EM8> and include the word DONE.

delearrte these task t openclaw and all test after this of srprint 3

tasks.title: Create Test Factories
tasks.description: Create factories for SlaPolicy and ActivityLog to support integration tests.

tasks.title: SLA Calculation Tests
tasks.description: Write feature tests verifying SLA calculations, specifically checking breached status and time-remaining fields.

tasks.title: Activity Log Tests
tasks.description: Write feature tests verifying activity log creation upon ticket status changes and assignments.

tasks.title: Ticket Assignment and Filter Tests
tasks.description: Write feature tests covering ticket claim/assignment flow with proper authorization, and verify filtered index for my_tickets and unassigned scopes.

tasks.title: Dashboard Metrics Tests
tasks.description: Write feature tests to verify the dashboard metrics endpoint output shape and the accuracy of the returned values.
